channel.title: SAMPLE Materials Industry News (FIXTURE)
channel.description: Synthetic news feed for hexa-matter Phase F offline-replay selftest.

item.title: FIXTURE: New 12-inch SiC wafer fabrication line announced
item.description: SAMPLE-VENDOR-CORP announces 12-inch SiC wafer line for power electronics applications.

item.title: FIXTURE: Perovskite solar module 24.6% efficiency reported (lab cell)
item.description: Lab-scale halide perovskite cell hits 24.6% efficiency. 25-year operational lifetime UNVERIFIED at commercial scale.

item.title: FIXTURE: MOF DAC pilot signed for 50 t/yr CO2 capture
item.description: UNPROVEN cost claims at $100/t CO2; Climeworks amine baseline remains $600-1000/t per peer-reviewed reports.
